ponytail.goal: reward deletion, dependency avoidance, stdlib/native solutions, and minimal sufficient changes

ponytail-audit.goal: detect real defects in PR diffs with evidence and severity

nerd-code.goal: build or fix production code from vague or issue-like prompts and pass tests

conductor.goal: orchestrate multi-phase/multi-file changes with handoffs and validation

critical-review.goal: prioritize severity and block release-impacting issues without noise

security-sentinel.goal: find and repair security vulnerabilities with CWE/OWASP mapping

copilot-memory-harness.goal: turn durable lessons/traces into useful instructions without stale memory or leakage

skill-doctor.goal: diagnose and improve skills via bounded patches and keep-or-revert
golden_sources: real skill diffs in this repo

skill-anatomy-optimizer.goal: audit skill anatomy, generate eval design, and enforce research-grade proof of improvement
